services.title: Digital solutions

description.all: All my services for your digital presence
description.web: Showcase sites, e-commerce and web applications, performant and scalable
description.mobile: Native and hybrid apps for iOS, Android and tablets
description.design: Visual identity, mockups and redesign for a professional image
description.consulting: Digital strategy, technical audit and personalized support

items.question: What is the average duration of a project?
items.answer: Each project progresses at its own pace. Allow 1 to 2 weeks for a showcase site, 3 to 6 weeks for an e-commerce site, and 2 to 4 months for a custom application. The essential thing? A result that truly reflects you, without compromising on quality.

items.question: What if I'm not satisfied with the result?
items.answer: Your satisfaction is my only finish line. If a detail doesn't suit you, I'll improve it without limit until the result exceeds your expectations. That's why my partners are so enthusiastic about my work.

items.question: Do you provide follow-up after delivery?
items.answer: Absolutely. One month of support is included to accompany you after launch. And if needed, maintenance plans are available to ensure the longevity of your project.

items.question: Can I make changes during the project?
items.answer: Of course! We work in stages with regular validation points. Your project evolves with your ideas, and I adapt so that it remains perfectly aligned with your vision.

items.question: How much do your services cost?
items.answer: Each project is unique. I provide a personalized quote after understanding your needs, objectives and scope. This guarantees a solution perfectly adapted to your vision and budget.

items.question: How does the first exchange work?
items.answer: Free and with no obligation, it lasts about 30 minutes. It's the ideal time to discuss your goals, your ideas, and see together if our collaboration makes sense.

projetsData.title: Projects
projetsData.subtitle: A selection of websites and applications designed to meet various needs, from MVP to large-scale projects.

footer.note: * Each project is unique and involved close collaboration with the client

projects.title: African Fashion E-commerce
projects.description: Online sales platform for African creators with local payments
projects.objective: Create an e-commerce platform that allows African creators to sell their products internationally while offering local payment methods (Mobile Money, Orange Money, etc.).
projects.challenge: Integrate multiple local payment gateways while maintaining a smooth and secure user experience.
projects.solution: Development of a custom solution with Next.js for the frontend and integration of multiple payment gateways adapted to the African market. Intuitive interface for creators and smooth shopping experience for customers.

projects.title: Delivery App
projects.description: Food delivery app with real-time tracking
projects.objective: Develop a mobile food delivery application allowing users to order from local restaurants and track their order in real time.
projects.challenge: Optimize real-time tracking of delivery personnel while preserving battery life.
projects.solution: Cross-platform application with React Native, REST API with Node.js and MongoDB database. Integration of mapping for delivery tracking and push notification system.

projects.title: SME Management Dashboard
projects.description: Complete management tool for SMEs (invoices, inventory, clients)
projects.objective: Centralize daily operations management (invoicing, inventory, customer relations) in a single, intuitive interface.
projects.challenge: Create a simple yet powerful interface capable of handling complex data in real time.
projects.solution: Progressive web application with Vue.js for the user interface and Laravel for the backend API. MySQL database optimized for complex reporting queries.

projects.title: Real Estate Showcase Site
projects.description: Site for real estate agency with virtual tours
projects.objective: Create a modern showcase site to present real estate properties with integrated virtual tours and contact form.
projects.challenge: Integrate 360° virtual tours without compromising site performance.
projects.solution: WordPress site with Elementor for an attractive visual interface. Integration of Google Maps API for property location and virtual tour plugin.

projects.title: Fitness App
projects.description: Sports coaching app with performance tracking
projects.objective: Allow coaches to create personalized programs and users to track their sessions and progress.
projects.challenge: Create a smooth offline experience with automatic synchronization.
projects.solution: Web application, Firebase for authentication and real-time data, GraphQL for optimized queries.

projects.title: E-learning Platform
projects.description: Online course platform with quizzes and certifications
projects.objective: Create an online learning platform with course management, automatic quizzes and certificate generation.
projects.challenge: Handle thousands of simultaneous users with heavy multimedia content.
projects.solution: React frontend with Redux for state management, Django REST framework backend, PostgreSQL database. Interactive quiz system and automatic PDF generation for certificates.

projects.title: Charity Association Site
projects.description: Donation site with crowdfunding campaign and real-time donation tracking.
projects.objective: Create an online donation platform allowing crowdfunding campaigns and real-time donation tracking.
projects.challenge: Set up a system for recurring and one-time donations with a smooth and secure user experience.
projects.solution: Development with Next.js for frontend and API, Stripe integration for payments, and Prisma for data management. Intuitive interface with real-time campaign tracking.

projects.title: Health App
projects.description: Medical tracking app with medication reminders and secure data sharing.
projects.objective: Develop a web and mobile application allowing patients to track their medical treatment with reminders and securely share their data with their doctors.
projects.challenge: Ensure the security of medical data while offering a simple and intuitive user experience.
projects.solution: React Native application with JWT authentication, Node.js backend and MongoDB. Encryption of sensitive data and push notification system for reminders.

projects.title: ERP for Logistics
projects.description: Logistics management system with fleet tracking, order management and reporting.
projects.objective: Create a custom ERP to manage all logistics operations: vehicle fleet, customer orders, delivery routes and reporting.
projects.challenge: Coordinate real-time data between delivery personnel, fleet managers and customers.
projects.solution: Web application with Vue.js for the interface, Laravel for the API and WebSockets for real-time updates. Customizable dashboards and advanced reporting system.

projects.title: Craft Marketplace
projects.description: Marketplace for local artisans with seller management and secure payments.
projects.objective: Launch a marketplace allowing local artisans to sell their creations online with fair commission and simple management tools.
projects.challenge: Create a multi-vendor system with commission management, inventory and separate payments.
projects.solution: Development with Next.js for frontend and API, Stripe Connect for multi-vendor payments, PostgreSQL for data and Redis for cache. Intuitive seller dashboard and product moderation system.
